title: Invitrogen Platinum SuperFi II PCR
description: Thermo Fisher Platinum SuperFi II DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a universal 60 C anneal and 72 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: Thermo Fisher Scientific (Invitrogen), Platinum SuperFi II DNA Polymerase (Cat. 12361010). Recommended universal 60 C annealing works for most primers (the iso-stabilizing buffer removes the need for per-primer optimization). Cycles 25-35. Extension 15-30 sec/kb at 72 C. A 2-step protocol (combine anneal+extend at 72 C) works for primers >30 nt. Reduce primers to 0.2 uM for targets >5 kb and multiplex. Efficient up to 75% GC without added melting agents. Source: https://documents.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/LSG/manuals/MAN0018859_Platinum_SuperFi_II_DNA_Pol_UG.pdf
